title: hieracium murorum subsp. nubilum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. nubilum, also known as wall hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. nubilum include reducing fever, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. nubilum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
